TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kung-cu atu balaut kungku nu kamu caysiw-caytu a mihcaan nu Niw-aw-lan , wawa henay ci Ti-an-na idaw ku nipisimsiman nida atu wama mangalay misiwbay tu kakanen, nika siidaay nida a cabayan ci Ayle-e mihalhal tu aidaw ku mahicaay kiya nu kasasungalayan a kawawan. dimiadan tu, nikapatayan nu wama ni Tian-na mahida tu ku kawaw nida misuped tu kalisiw micakay tu lala', a idaw ku nidatengan tu nu udip a sasiwbayan. tawya, Mae-duo-niya (ť¶¨ÁąĺŚ§öŚįľšļě Maldonia) a Lay-wun wan-ce tayni i tini mikilin tu sasaacawaan, pabeli han ni Tian-na ci Ayle-e tu sasaasuay nu kakanen, kya yadah ku cipu ni Tian-na anu masuped tu ku cipu, kya idaw ku sapicakay tu nikaiya nutaw a luma'an. manamuh tu dadadiwan kiya Lay-wun wan-ce , sademiada sa midang nai' ku balucu misakakawaw, mapatucek nu itdaay a la'cusay nu mapalaway, pacebaan nu mapalaway tayda pesan nu mapalway malabalaut. yu mahida ni sawacuan ni Lay-wun wan-ce a tubang nida cinida tu ku waywayan, idaw ku sibalucuay a sapialaway tu zaysang a tademawan ci Huo puo-se atu ci Law-lun-se . pilitemuhan tu lalukiyawan a kawawan, idaw ku musakamuay ci Tian-na an anu caay kisu kayaydatu paaca, asipacakay kisu han. mangusebit a dihen ku bihid niTian-na suayaw sa cinida tu tapuku, i salining malitemuh nida ku malabalutay a tademaw ci Lay-wun, yukiwan nida kisuen kaku sa kya malatademaw kaku, alaw caykalaheci malabalut namin ku nuheni tatusa. mabiyalaw tu ku nuhini tatusa, milawlaw tu i kalimulakan ku nuheni tatusa, sadikuday masiket nu besu mubahel taydan i lanulanuan, kilalebu hantu nu e'yi. sakatusa a demiad, culal sa ku manamuhay tu dadadiwan a E'yi ci Alu, sakamusa idaw ku matinengay a mapalaway ci Laipuo misumad pataluman malatademawan sa, ci Alu mangalay malatademaw mapulung midatuk, lakal satu tayda mikilim ci Laipuoan. muculil henay, bateluan nu balaut a miadupay, tumian misaiculang ku nuheni mahulak. caay kaw matinengay tina kawawan ci Ayle ku mangalay miyukiw tu sapikikun tu ci misengiay a Laywenan, kumamasumad tu ya pacebaay a Lawen mangalay tu idang nu tatengaay a Laywenan kay taneng paceba sa, ci Huo-puose idaw ku sapatahekal nida tu adingu a hitayan ku midakep tu nuhenian. mungangaw ku dadan nuheni taydan i lanulanuan, tumian idaw ku adipawpawnay mipadan patakilal tu dadan, taydan i luma' ni Laipuo. nina kawawan, masamataan a tademawan ci Tian-nan maliyuh misinsin tu canan a sakaudipan, hina mapaciemay a tatusa ci Tian-nan atu Laywen alaw han haymawsa a kapah kuhini, nusiidaay a wawaan ci Laywen malingatu tu matineng misakakawaw tu kakanen, masasupadang ku nuheni tatusa tu caaya kadem nu kawawan nuheni alaw masasumidang ku nuheni. debung nu adingu a hitayan, suayawan ni Laipuo a miala ku nuheni, saan ci Laypuo anu matepa' ku nabalucuan kya mahulak ku nitimaan. pabaliw ku nuheni anu makakisu tatusa a malatamedaw tu sa, ubiyan nuheni mikacaw ku balunga aytaban nu labii katukuh i luma' sa. manamuh ci Laywen ci Tian-nan an, ku miyukiw tu sapikikun cinidaan, nika ci Tian-na misimsim tu sasakawawan nida tu kakanen, ci Lawen paayaw tu nabalucuan ni Tian-nan, pabalucu' sa tu ci Ayle-e a mikimung, idaw tu ku kalisiw sapabeli ci Tian-nan an misiwbay tu kakanen. liyas sa hen ci Laywen, caay pihaymaw madakep ni Huopuo-se, ci Aylee atu pacebaay a Lawen ku mikikung tu. ci Tian-nan palutatenga mapataluma' tu ci pacebaan a Laywenan, ci Acun tada mangabil tu tela' sa kukamu katinengan ni Lawen ku nabalucuan. Acun, Alu atu Tian-nan matatules ku lima nuheni mialaw tu nitimaan a uduan, sadikuday malawpesm, ci Huo-puose cuduhen patayda i duutduutan, ya pacebaay a Lawen nan malatademaw tu ci Lawlunse dakepen. ci Aylee maadih nida ci Tian-nan atu ci Laywen tuni kasasungaayan, mangalay mihulak mitima' tu sakaykisuan , taban nu labiyi masuni ku tuki mahida henay ku nuheni tatusa u balaut henay. ci Acun maemek nu mapalaway mapatay, tanunamuh satu atu mamidang dida ci Yiwen-cialin, mala tapukuan nu cacaya a bunacan. sadikuday, nipida'su an ni Laypuo, ina tatusaay a balaut itida i lanulanuan pada'suan nu katuuday mikikung ku nuheni. u wawa nu siidaay ci Laywen, siacawa ci Tian-nanan mala tatengaay tu nu kuncu, kisu hantu ni Laywen ci Tian-nan, tluma' satu malatademaw. ci Tian-nan malaheci tu nida ku sapikawaw tu kakanen , atu ci Laywen hida satu ku nikakapah a maudip, malawanhui tu. mahedek tu kina kakungkuan.
S.PHON: kuŇč- ¶u atu bar~…ĺaut kuŇčku nu kamu ¶ajsiw- ¶ajtu a mińß ¶aan nu niw-aw-r~…ĺan , wawa ńß…ônaj ¶i ti-an-na idaw ku nipisimsiman nida atu wama maŇčar~…ĺaj misiwbaj tu kakan…ôn, nika siidaaj nida a ¶abajan ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô-…ô mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu aidaw ku mańßi ¶aaj kija nu kasasuŇčar~…ĺajan a kawawan. dimiadan tu, nikapatajan nu wama ni tian-na mańßida tu ku kawaw nida misup…ôd tu kar~…ĺisiw mi ¶akaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, a idaw ku nidat…ôŇčan tu nu udip a sasiwbajan. tawja, ma…ô-duo-nija (***** mar~…ĺdonia) a r~…ĺaj-wun wan- ¶…ô tajni i tini mikir~…ĺin tu sasaa ¶awaan, pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßan ni tian-na ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô-…ô tu sasaasuaj nu kakan…ôn, kja jadańß ku ¶ipu ni tian-na anu masup…ôd tu ku ¶ipu, kja idaw ku sapi ¶akaj tu nikaija nutaw a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. manamuńß tu dadadiwan kija r~…ĺaj-wun wan- ¶…ô , sad…ômiada sa midaŇč nai Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu ¶u misakakawaw, mapatu ¶…ôk nu itdaaj a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu mapar~…ĺawaj, pa ¶…ôbaan nu mapar~…ĺawaj tajda p…ôsan nu mapar~…ĺwaj mar~…ĺabar~…ĺaut. ju mańßida ni sawa ¶uan ni r~…ĺaj-wun wan- ¶…ô a tubaŇč nida ¶inida tu ku wajwajan, idaw ku sibar~…ĺu ¶uaj a sapiar~…ĺawaj tu zajsaŇč a tad…ômawan ¶i ńßuo puo-s…ô atu ¶i r~…ĺaw-r~…ĺun-s…ô . pir~…ĺit…ômuńßan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺukijawan a kawawan, idaw ku musakamuaj ¶i tian-na an anu ¶aaj kisu kajajdatu paa ¶a, asipa ¶akaj kisu ńßan. maŇčus…ôbit a dińß…ôn ku bińßid nitian-na suajaw sa ¶inida tu tapuku, i sar~…ĺiniŇč mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ku mar~…ĺabar~…ĺutaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺaj-wun, jukiwan nida kisu…ôn kaku sa kja mar~…ĺatad…ômaw kaku, ar~…ĺaw ¶ajkar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mar~…ĺabar~…ĺut namin ku nuńß…ôni tatusa. mabijar~…ĺaw tu ku nuńßini tatusa, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu i kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan ku nuńß…ôni tatusa, sadikudaj masik…ôt nu b…ôsu mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tajdan i r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan, kir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ńßantu nu …ô Ē~ °ji. sakatusa a d…ômiad, ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ sa ku manamuńßaj tu dadadiwan a …ô Ē~ °ji ¶i ar~…ĺu, sakamusa idaw ku matin…ôŇčaj a mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i r~…ĺaipuo misumad patar~…ĺuman mar~…ĺatad…ômawan sa, ¶i ar~…ĺu maŇčar~…ĺaj mar~…ĺatad…ômaw mapur~…ĺuŇč midatuk, r~…ĺakar~…ĺ satu tajda mikir~…ĺim ¶i r~…ĺaipuoan. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńß…ônaj, bat…ôr~…ĺuan nu bar~…ĺaut a miadupaj, tumian misai ¶ur~…ĺaŇč ku nuńß…ôni mańßur~…ĺak. ¶aaj kaw matin…ôŇčaj tina kawawan ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô ku maŇčar~…ĺaj mijukiw tu sapikikun tu ¶i mis…ôŇčiaj a r~…ĺajw…ônan, kumamasumad tu ja pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺaw…ôn maŇčar~…ĺaj tu idaŇč nu tat…ôŇčaaj a r~…ĺajw…ônan kaj tan…ôŇč pa ¶…ôba sa, ¶i ńßuo-puos…ô idaw ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nida tu adiŇču a ńßitajan ku midak…ôp tu nuńß…ônian. muŇčaŇčaw ku dadan nuńß…ôni tajdan i r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan, tumian idaw ku adipawpawnaj mipadan patakir~…ĺar~…ĺ tu dadan, tajdan i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni r~…ĺaipuo. nina kawawan, masamataan a tad…ômawan ¶i tian-nan mar~…ĺijuńß misinsin tu ¶anan a sakaudipan, ńßina mapa ¶i…ômaj a tatusa ¶i tian-nan atu r~…ĺajw…ôn ar~…ĺaw ńßan ńßajmawsa a kapańß kuńßini, nusiidaaj a wawaan ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu matin…ôŇč misakakawaw tu kakan…ôn, masasupadaŇč ku nuńß…ôni tatusa tu ¶aaja kad…ôm nu kawawan nuńß…ôni ar~…ĺaw masasumidaŇč ku nuńß…ôni. d…ôbuŇč nu adiŇču a ńßitajan, suajawan ni r~…ĺaipuo a miar~…ĺa ku nuńß…ôni, saan ¶i r~…ĺajpuo anu mat…ôpa Ē~ ° ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan kja mańßur~…ĺak ku nitimaan. pabar~…ĺiw ku nuńß…ôni anu makakisu tatusa a mar~…ĺatam…ôdaw tu sa, ubijan nuńß…ôni mika ¶aw ku bar~…ĺuŇča ajtaban nu r~…ĺabii katukuńß i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa. manamuńß ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn ¶i tian-nan an, ku mijukiw tu sapikikun ¶inidaan, nika ¶i tian-na misimsim tu sasakawawan nida tu kakan…ôn, ¶i r~…ĺaw…ôn paajaw tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan ni tian-nan, pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sa tu ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô-…ô a mikimuŇč, idaw tu ku kar~…ĺisiw sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i tian-nan an misiwbaj tu kakan…ôn. r~…ĺijas sa ńß…ôn ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn, ¶aaj pińßajmaw madak…ôp ni ńßuopuo-s…ô, ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô…ô atu pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺaw…ôn ku mikikuŇč tu. ¶i tian-nan par~…ĺutat…ôŇča mapatar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu ¶i pa ¶…ôbaan a r~…ĺajw…ônan, ¶i a ¶un tada maŇčabir~…ĺ tu t…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa kukamu katin…ôŇčan ni r~…ĺaw…ôn ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan. a ¶un, ar~…ĺu atu tian-nan matatur~…ĺ…ôs ku r~…ĺima nuńß…ôni miar~…ĺaw tu nitimaan a uduan, sadikudaj mar~…ĺawp…ôsm, ¶i ńßuo-puos…ô ¶uduńß…ôn patajda i duutduutan, ja pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺaw…ôn nan mar~…ĺatad…ômaw tu ¶i r~…ĺawr~…ĺuns…ô dak…ôp…ôn. ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô…ô maadińß nida ¶i tian-nan atu ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn tuni kasasuŇčaajan, maŇčar~…ĺaj mińßur~…ĺak mitima Ē~ ° tu sakajkisuan , taban nu r~…ĺabiji masuni ku tuki mańßida ńß…ônaj ku nuńß…ôni tatusa u bar~…ĺaut ńß…ônaj. ¶i a ¶un ma…ôm…ôk nu mapar~…ĺawaj mapataj, tanunamuńß satu atu mamidaŇč dida ¶i jiw…ôn- ¶iar~…ĺin, mar~…ĺa tapukuan nu ¶a ¶aja a buna ¶an. sadikudaj, nipida Ē~ °su an ni r~…ĺajpuo, ina tatusaaj a bar~…ĺaut itida i r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan pada Ē~ °suan nu katuudaj mikikuŇč ku nuńß…ôni. u wawa nu siidaaj ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn, sia ¶awa ¶i tian-nanan mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj tu nu kun ¶u, kisu ńßantu ni r~…ĺajw…ôn ¶i tian-nan, tr~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu mar~…ĺatad…ômaw. ¶i tian-nan mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu nida ku sapikawaw tu kakan…ôn , atu ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn ńßida satu ku nikakapańß a maudip, mar~…ĺawanńßui tu. mańß…ôd…ôk tu kina kakuŇčkuan.
S.FORM: kung-cu atu balaut kungku nu kamu caysiw-caytu a mihcaan nu Niw-aw-lan , wawa henay ci Ti-an-na idaw ku nipisimsiman nida atu wama mangalay misiwbay tu kakanen, nika siidaay nida a cabayan ci Ayle-e mihalhal tu aidaw ku mahicaay kiya nu kasasungalayan a kawawan. dimiadan tu, nikapatayan nu wama ni Tian-na mahida tu ku kawaw nida misuped tu kalisiw micakay tu lala', a idaw ku nidatengan tu nu udip a sasiwbayan. tawya, Mae-duo-niya (ť¶¨ÁąĺŚ§öŚįľšļě Maldonia) a Lay-wun wan-ce tayni i tini mikilin tu sasaacawaan, pabeli han ni Tian-na ci Ayle-e tu sasaasuay nu kakanen, kya yadah ku cipu ni Tian-na anu masuped tu ku cipu, kya idaw ku sapicakay tu nikaiya nutaw a luma'an. manamuh tu dadadiwan kiya Lay-wun wan-ce , sademiada sa midang nai' ku balucu misakakawaw, mapatucek nu itdaay a la'cusay nu mapalaway, pacebaan nu mapalaway tayda pesan nu mapalway malabalaut. yu mahida ni sawacuan ni Lay-wun wan-ce a tubang nida cinida tu ku waywayan, idaw ku sibalucuay a sapialaway tu zaysang a tademawan ci Huo puo-se atu ci Law-lun-se . pilitemuhan tu lalukiyawan a kawawan, idaw ku musakamuay ci Tian-na an anu caay kisu kayaydatu paaca, asipacakay kisu han. mangusebit a dihen ku bihid niTian-na suayaw sa cinida tu tapuku, i salining malitemuh nida ku malabalutay a tademaw ci Lay-wun, yukiwan nida kisuen kaku sa kya malatademaw kaku, alaw caykalaheci malabalut namin ku nuheni tatusa. mabiyalaw tu ku nuhini tatusa, milawlaw tu i kalimulakan ku nuheni tatusa, sadikuday masiket nu besu mubahel taydan i lanulanuan, kilalebu hantu nu e'yi. sakatusa a demiad, culal sa ku manamuhay tu dadadiwan a E'yi ci Alu, sakamusa idaw ku matinengay a mapalaway ci Laipuo misumad pataluman malatademawan sa, ci Alu mangalay malatademaw mapulung midatuk, lakal satu tayda mikilim ci Laipuoan. muculil henay, bateluan nu balaut a miadupay, tumian misaiculang ku nuheni mahulak. caay kaw matinengay tina kawawan ci Ayle ku mangalay miyukiw tu sapikikun tu ci misengiay a Laywenan, kumamasumad tu ya pacebaay a Lawen mangalay tu idang nu tatengaay a Laywenan kay taneng paceba sa, ci Huo-puose idaw ku sapatahekal nida tu adingu a hitayan ku midakep tu nuhenian. mungangaw ku dadan nuheni taydan i lanulanuan, tumian idaw ku adipawpawnay mipadan patakilal tu dadan, taydan i luma' ni Laipuo. nina kawawan, masamataan a tademawan ci Tian-nan maliyuh misinsin tu canan a sakaudipan, hina mapaciemay a tatusa ci Tian-nan atu Laywen alaw han haymawsa a kapah kuhini, nusiidaay a wawaan ci Laywen malingatu tu matineng misakakawaw tu kakanen, masasupadang ku nuheni tatusa tu caaya kadem nu kawawan nuheni alaw masasumidang ku nuheni. debung nu adingu a hitayan, suayawan ni Laipuo a miala ku nuheni, saan ci Laypuo anu matepa' ku nabalucuan kya mahulak ku nitimaan. pabaliw ku nuheni anu makakisu tatusa a malatamedaw tu sa, ubiyan nuheni mikacaw ku balunga aytaban nu labii katukuh i luma' sa. manamuh ci Laywen ci Tian-nan an, ku miyukiw tu sapikikun cinidaan, nika ci Tian-na misimsim tu sasakawawan nida tu kakanen, ci Lawen paayaw tu nabalucuan ni Tian-nan, pabalucu' sa tu ci Ayle-e a mikimung, idaw tu ku kalisiw sapabeli ci Tian-nan an misiwbay tu kakanen. liyas sa hen ci Laywen, caay pihaymaw madakep ni Huopuo-se, ci Aylee atu pacebaay a Lawen ku mikikung tu. ci Tian-nan palutatenga mapataluma' tu ci pacebaan a Laywenan, ci Acun tada mangabil tu tela' sa kukamu katinengan ni Lawen ku nabalucuan. Acun, Alu atu Tian-nan matatules ku lima nuheni mialaw tu nitimaan a uduan, sadikuday malawpesm, ci Huo-puose cuduhen patayda i duutduutan, ya pacebaay a Lawen nan malatademaw tu ci Lawlunse dakepen. ci Aylee maadih nida ci Tian-nan atu ci Laywen tuni kasasungaayan, mangalay mihulak mitima' tu sakaykisuan , taban nu labiyi masuni ku tuki mahida henay ku nuheni tatusa u balaut henay. ci Acun maemek nu mapalaway mapatay, tanunamuh satu atu mamidang dida ci Yiwen-cialin, mala tapukuan nu cacaya a bunacan. sadikuday, nipida'su an ni Laypuo, ina tatusaay a balaut itida i lanulanuan pada'suan nu katuuday mikikung ku nuheni. u wawa nu siidaay ci Laywen, siacawa ci Tian-nanan mala tatengaay tu nu kuncu, kisu hantu ni Laywen ci Tian-nan, tluma' satu malatademaw. ci Tian-nan malaheci tu nida ku sapikawaw tu kakanen , atu ci Laywen hida satu ku nikakapah a maudip, malawanhui tu. mahedek tu kina kakungkuan.

nida a ¶abajan ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô-…ô mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu aidaw ku mańßi ¶aaj kija nu kasasuŇčar~…ĺajan a kawawan. dimiadan tu, nikapatajan nu wama ni tian-na mańßida tu ku kawaw nida misup…ôd tu kar~…ĺisiw tian-na ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô-…ô tu sasaasuaj nu kakan…ôn, kja jadańß ku ¶ipu ni tian-na anu masup…ôd tu ku ¶ipu, kja idaw ku sapi ¶akaj tu nikaija nutaw a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. manamuńß tu dadadiwan kija r~…ĺaj-wun wan- ¶…ô , sad…ômiada sa midaŇč nai Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu ¶u misakakawaw, mapatu ¶…ôk nu itdaaj a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu mapar~…ĺawaj, pa ¶…ôbaan nu mapar~…ĺawaj tajda p…ôsan nu mapar~…ĺwaj mar~…ĺabar~…ĺaut. pir~…ĺit…ômuńßan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺukijawan a kawawan, idaw ku musakamuaj ¶i tian-na an anu ¶aaj kisu kajajdatu paa ¶a, asipa ¶akaj kisu ńßan. maŇčus…ôbit a dińß…ôn ku bińßid nitian-na suajaw sa ¶inida tu tapuku, i sar~…ĺiniŇč mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ku mar~…ĺabar~…ĺutaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺaj-wun, jukiwan nida kisu…ôn kaku sa kja mar~…ĺatad…ômaw kaku, ar~…ĺaw ¶ajkar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mar~…ĺabar~…ĺut namin ku nuńß…ôni tatusa. mabijar~…ĺaw tu ku nuńßini tatusa, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu i kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan ku nuńß…ôni tatusa, sadikudaj masik…ôt nu b…ôsu mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tajdan i r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan, kir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ńßantu nu …ô Ē~ °ji. sakatusa a d…ômiad, ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ sa ku manamuńßaj tu dadadiwan a …ô Ē~ °ji ¶i ar~…ĺu, sakamusa idaw ku matin…ôŇčaj a mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i r~…ĺaipuo misumad patar~…ĺuman mar~…ĺatad…ômawan sa, ¶i ar~…ĺu maŇčar~…ĺaj mar~…ĺatad…ômaw mapur~…ĺuŇč midatuk, r~…ĺakar~…ĺ satu tajda mikir~…ĺim ¶i r~…ĺaipuoan. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńß…ônaj, bat…ôr~…ĺuan nu bar~…ĺaut a miadupaj, tumian misai ¶ur~…ĺaŇč ku nuńß…ôni mańßur~…ĺak. ¶aaj kaw matin…ôŇčaj tina kawawan ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô ku maŇčar~…ĺaj mijukiw tu sapikikun tu ¶i mis…ôŇčiaj a r~…ĺajw…ônan, kumamasumad tu ja pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺaw…ôn maŇčar~…ĺaj tu idaŇč r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan, tumian idaw ku adipawpawnaj mipadan patakir~…ĺar~…ĺ tu dadan, tajdan i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni r~…ĺaipuo. nina kawawan, masamataan a tad…ômawan ¶i tian-nan mar~…ĺijuńß misinsin tu ¶anan a sakaudipan, ńßina mapa ¶i…ômaj a tatusa ¶i tian-nan atu r~…ĺajw…ôn ar~…ĺaw ńßan ńßajmawsa a kapańß kuńßini, nusiidaaj a wawaan ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu matin…ôŇč misakakawaw tu kakan…ôn, masasupadaŇč ku nuńß…ôni tatusa tu ¶aaja kad…ôm nu kawawan nuńß…ôni ar~…ĺaw masasumidaŇč ku nuńß…ôni. d…ôbuŇč nu adiŇču a ńßitajan, suajawan ni r~…ĺaipuo a miar~…ĺa ku nuńß…ôni, saan ¶i r~…ĺajpuo anu mat…ôpa Ē~ ° ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan kja mańßur~…ĺak ku nitimaan. pabar~…ĺiw ku nuńß…ôni anu makakisu tatusa a mar~…ĺatam…ôdaw tu sa, ubijan nuńß…ôni mika ¶aw ku bar~…ĺuŇča ajtaban nu r~…ĺabii katukuńß i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa. manamuńß ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn ¶i tian-nan an, ku mijukiw tu sapikikun ¶inidaan, nika ¶i tian-na misimsim tu sasakawawan nida tu kakan…ôn, ¶i r~…ĺaw…ôn paajaw tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan ni tian-nan, pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sa tu ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô-…ô a mikimuŇč, idaw tu ku kar~…ĺisiw sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i tian-nan an misiwbaj tu kakan…ôn. r~…ĺijas sa ńß…ôn ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn, ¶aaj pińßajmaw madak…ôp ni ńßuopuo-s…ô, ¶i ajr~…ĺ…ô…ô atu pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺaw…ôn ku mikikuŇč tu. ¶i tian-nan par~…ĺutat…ôŇča mapatar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu ¶i pa ¶…ôbaan a r~…ĺajw…ônan, ¶i a ¶un tada maŇčabir~…ĺ tu t…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa kukamu katin…ôŇčan ni r~…ĺaw…ôn ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan. a ¶un, ar~…ĺu atu tian-nan matatur~…ĺ…ôs ku r~…ĺima nuńß…ôni miar~…ĺaw tu nitimaan a uduan, sadikudaj mar~…ĺawp…ôsm, ¶i ńßuo-puos…ô ¶uduńß…ôn patajda i duutduutan, ja sakajkisuan , taban nu r~…ĺabiji masuni ku tuki mańßida ńß…ônaj ku nuńß…ôni tatusa u bar~…ĺaut ńß…ônaj. ¶i a ¶un ma…ôm…ôk nu mapar~…ĺawaj mapataj, tanunamuńß satu atu mamidaŇč dida ¶i jiw…ôn- ¶iar~…ĺin, mar~…ĺa tapukuan nu ¶a ¶aja a buna ¶an. sadikudaj, nipida Ē~ °su an ni r~…ĺajpuo, ina tatusaaj a bar~…ĺaut itida i r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan pada Ē~ °suan nu katuudaj mikikuŇč ku nuńß…ôni. u wawa nu sapikawaw tu kakan…ôn , atu ¶i r~…ĺajw…ôn ńßida satu ku nikakapańß a maudip, mar~…ĺawanńßui tu. mańß…ôd…ôk tu kina kakuŇčkuan.
